assertions.name: analogy-first-line
assertions.description: The explanation starts with an everyday analogy, not technical jargon

assertions.name: no-tech-terms-in-intro
assertions.description: The introductory sentence avoids programming terms like 'binary search', 'algorithm', 'divide and conquer', 'logarithmic', 'pointer', 'index'

assertions.name: dictionary-analogy
assertions.description: Uses a familiar real-world analogy like dictionary lookup, guessing game, or phone book

assertions.name: consistent-analogy
assertions.description: Sticks to one consistent analogy throughout the explanation

assertions.name: summary-present
assertions.description: Ends with a one-sentence summary of what the code does
